title: danais fragrans
intro: Danais fragrans, also known as the "fragrant flowered Danais" or "bleeding heart plant," is a flowering plant species in the madder family. Traditionally, the plant's root has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Danais fragrans include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
